props.name: commandMenu
props.comment:
Mount the cmd+K command palette. Pass `true` for the default palette, or a
`<CommandMenu>` element to customize. The palette's context provider wraps
the admin tree, so any resource view can call `useRegisterCommand()`.

props.name: darkTheme
props.comment:
The theme applied in dark mode.

Falls back to `lightTheme` (or `theme`) if omitted.

props.name: lightTheme
props.comment: The theme applied in light mode.

props.name: theme
props.comment:
Convenience alias for `lightTheme`. Use this when you only want to pass
one named theme — its `light` and `dark` variable maps cover both modes.
